# Recommended GitHub Labels

Use this file as the source list when creating or updating repository labels in
GitHub.

| Label | Color | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `bug` | `d73a4a` | Existing behavior is broken or incorrect. |
| `enhancement` | `a2eeef` | Improvement to an existing workflow or capability. |
| `documentation` | `0075ca` | Documentation, examples, screenshots, or release notes. |
| `security` | `b60205` | Upload safety, data exposure, dependency risk, or unsafe defaults. |
| `good first issue` | `7057ff` | Scoped task suitable for a new contributor. |
| `roadmap` | `5319e7` | Planning item for a future phase or milestone. |
| `needs reproduction` | `d876e3` | Needs reproduction steps or environment details before action. |
| `priority-p0` | `b60205` | Release blocker, data corruption, or serious security risk. |
| `priority-p1` | `fbca04` | Important for the next release or main workflow. |
| `priority-p2` | `cfd3d7` | Useful but not urgent. |
| `maintenance` | `bfdadc` | Repository operations, CI, releases, or maintainer process. |
